criteria.label: C1 vocabulary density
criteria.description: Prioritize articles likely to contain advanced but teachable vocabulary.

criteria.label: Discussion readiness
criteria.description: Prefer stories that naturally create classroom debate or speaking prompts.

criteria.label: Business relevance
criteria.description: Favor business, markets, technology, policy, and workplace relevance.

criteria.label: Korean translation quality
criteria.description: Flag articles where idioms, dense quotes, or technical terms need careful Korean review.

criteria.label: Chart / media usefulness
criteria.description: Value charts, photos, and sidecars that support comprehension or classroom use.
